title: Kick
description: Kick your Enemies with Default R!
body:
# For all Versions at/after 2.1
- now chargeable
- Overlay
- full customisable trough the config


_Kick with Default R._
 
_If you only press R, you kick normally._
_If you sneak and release R, you kick up._


<details>
<summary>Fabric alternative</summary>

Spartan Kick: 
https://modrinth.com/mod/spartan-kick

By: **ratralfiofanov**
</details>
